STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELMONTE, ANTHONY WILSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURKES, CHESTER THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY STREET UNIT NO. 345 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $2,000.00 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,000.00, STAYED UNTIL SEP-27-2004, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COST AND ATTORNEY FEES. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
